name: image-to-markdown
description: Transcribe the images in a note to Markdown with a local vision LLM — fully offline, non-destructive, streaming into the sidebar.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "${OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_DIR:?Setze OBSIDIAN_PLUGIN_DIR auf dein Vault-Plugin-Verzeichnis}"/
